section.title: Demo Scenario
section.description: - Briefly describe the demo scenario that shows how key hypotheses can be validated. - Ensure the scenario aligns with Section 2.
section.example: 1. Amanda visited the shoes category page on our shopping website a week ago. 2. Amanda received a 30% discount coupon via email. 3. Amanda clicks the link in the email, which redirects her to the shoes category page. 4. Amanda buys a pair of shoes using the discount coupon, which is automatically applied to the order.
